title: chore(deps): update dependency docker to v7
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [docker](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py) ([changelog](https://docker-py.readthedocs.io/en/stable/change-log.html)) | `~=6.1.0` -> `~=7.1.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/pypi/docker/7.1.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/pypi/docker/7.1.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/pypi/docker/6.1.3/7.1.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/pypi/docker/6.1.3/7.1.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>docker/docker-py (docker)</summary>

### [`v7.1.0`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/releases/tag/7.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/compare/7.0.0...7.1.0)

#### Upgrade Notes

-   Bumped minimum engine API version to 1.24
-   Bumped default engine API version to 1.44 (Moby 25.0)

#### Bugfixes

-   Fixed issue with tag parsing when the registry address includes ports that resulted in `invalid tag format` errors
-   Fixed issue preventing creating new configs (`ConfigCollection`), which failed with a `KeyError` due to the `name` field
-   Fixed an issue due to an update in the [requests](https://redirect.github.com/psf/requests) package breaking `docker-py` by applying the [suggested fix](https://redirect.github.com/psf/requests/pull/6710)

#### Miscellaneous

-   Documentation improvements
-   Updated Ruff (linter) and fixed minor linting issues
-   Packaging/CI updates
    -   Started using hatch for packaging (https://github.com/pypa/hatch)
    -   Updated `setup-python` github action
-   Updated tests
    -   Stopped checking for deprecated container and image related fields (`Container` and `ContainerConfig`)
    -   Updated tests that check `NetworkSettings.Networks.<network>.Aliases` due to engine changes

#### What's Changed

-   Bump default API version to 1.43 (Moby 24.0) by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3199](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3199)
-   integration/commit: Don't check for deprecated fields by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3203](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3203)
-   fix: tag regex should allow ports by [@​artificial-intelligence](https://redirect.github.com/artificial-intelligence) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3196](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3196)
-   utils: Fix datetime_to_timestamp by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3208](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3208)
-   fix: keyerror when creating new config([#​3110](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3110)) by [@​Khushiyant](https://redirect.github.com/Khushiyant) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3200](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3200)
-   Update Ruff, fix some minor issues by [@​akx](https://redirect.github.com/akx) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3206](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3206)
-   docs: change image.history() return type to list ([#​3076](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3076)) by [@​Khushiyant](https://redirect.github.com/Khushiyant) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3202](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3202)
-   lint: fix string formatting by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3211](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3211)
-   Drop `packaging` dependency by [@​akx](https://redirect.github.com/akx) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3205](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3205)
-   Bump default API version to 1.44 (Moby 25.0) by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3231](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3231)
-   Modernize build to use `hatchling` and `hatch-vcs` by [@​akx](https://redirect.github.com/akx) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3207](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3207)
-   Enable Ruff I (import sort), autofix by [@​akx](https://redirect.github.com/akx) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3212](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3212)
-   chore(ci): fix-ups across Make / Docker / GitHub Actions by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3241](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3241)
-   chore: fix return type docs for `container.logs()` by [@​BobDu](https://redirect.github.com/BobDu) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/2240](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/2240)
-   CI fix  by [@​krissetto](https://redirect.github.com/krissetto) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3260](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3260)
-   Fix for requests 2.32 by [@​felixfontein](https://redirect.github.com/felixfontein) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3257](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3257)
-   Added 7.1.0 changelog by [@​krissetto](https://redirect.github.com/krissetto) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3262](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3262)
-   Fix env var name in release pipeline by [@​krissetto](https://redirect.github.com/krissetto) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3263](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3263)
-   Change env var name in release pipeline to match hatch expectations by [@​krissetto](https://redirect.github.com/krissetto) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3264](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3264)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3199](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3199)
-   [@​artificial-intelligence](https://redirect.github.com/artificial-intelligence) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3196](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3196)
-   [@​Khushiyant](https://redirect.github.com/Khushiyant) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3200](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3200)
-   [@​BobDu](https://redirect.github.com/BobDu) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/2240](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/2240)
-   [@​krissetto](https://redirect.github.com/krissetto) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3260](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3260)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/docker/docker-py/compare/7.0.0...7.1.0

### [`v7.0.0`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/releases/tag/7.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/compare/6.1.3...7.0.0)

#### Upgrade Notes (from 6.x) ⚠️

-   Removed SSL version (`ssl_version`) and explicit hostname check (`assert_hostname`) options ([#​3185](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3185))
    -   `assert_hostname` has not been used since Python 3.6 and was removed in 3.12
    -   Python 3.7+ supports TLSv1.3 by default
-   Websocket support is no longer included by default ([#​3123](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3123))
    -   Use `pip install docker[websockets]` to include `websocket-client` dependency
    -   By default, `docker-py` hijacks the TCP connection and does not use Websockets
    -   Websocket client is only required to use `attach_socket(container, ws=True)`
-   Python 3.7 no longer supported (reached end-of-life June 2023) ([#​3187](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3187))

#### Features ✨

-   Python 3.12 support ([#​3185](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3185))
-   Full `networking_config` support for `containers.create()` ([#​3121](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3121))
    -   Replaces `network_driver_opt` (added in 6.1.0)
-   Add `health()` property to container that returns status (e.g. `unhealthy`) ([#​3147](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3147))
-   Add `pause` option to `container.commit()` ([#​3159](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3159))
-   Add support for bind mount propagation (e.g. `rshared`, `private`) ([#​3164](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3164))
-   Add support for `filters`, `keep_storage`, and `all` in `prune_builds()` on API v1.39+ ([#​3192](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3192))

#### Bugfixes 🐛

-   Consistently return `docker.errors.NotFound` on 404 responses ([#​3156](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3156))
-   Validate tag format before push ([#​3191](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3191))

##### Miscellaneous 🔧

-   Upgraded urllib3 version in `requirements.txt` (used for development/tests) ([#​3183](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3183))
-   Documentation typo fixes & formatting improvements ([#​3130](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3130))
-   Fixed integration test compatibility for newer Moby engine versions ([#​3165](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3165), [#​3166](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3166), [#​3145](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3145), [#​3169](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3169), [#​3170](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3170))
-   Switch to [ruff](https://redirect.github.com/astral-sh/ruff) for linting ([#​3126](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3126))

#### What's Changed

-   fix user_guides/multiplex.rst by [@​Longin-Yu](https://redirect.github.com/Longin-Yu) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3130](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3130)
-   tests/integration: fix flake8 failures (E721 do not compare types), and fix Dockerfile for debian "bookworm"  by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3166](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3166)
-   tests/integration: update some tests for updated error-messages by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3165](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3165)
-   README: fix link for CI status badge by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3167](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3167)
-   fix: use response.text to get string rather than bytes by [@​mndeveci](https://redirect.github.com/mndeveci) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3156](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3156)
-   feat: add pause option to commit api by [@​VincentLeeMax](https://redirect.github.com/VincentLeeMax) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3159](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3159)
-   build(deps): Bump requests from 2.28.1 to 2.31.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3136](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3136)
-   test: remove APT_MIRROR from Dockerfile by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3145](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3145)
-   Switch linting to ruff, use f-strings, fix lint errors and possible bugs by [@​akx](https://redirect.github.com/akx) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3126](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3126)
-   integration: Fix bad subnet declaration by [@​akerouanton](https://redirect.github.com/akerouanton) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3169](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3169)
-   integration: Remove test_create_check_duplicate by [@​akerouanton](https://redirect.github.com/akerouanton) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3170](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3170)
-   Support all `Network.connect` parameters in `client.containers.run` and `client.containers.create` by [@​Skazza94](https://redirect.github.com/Skazza94) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3121](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3121)
-   feat: move websocket-client to extra dependency by [@​akx](https://redirect.github.com/akx) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3123](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3123)
-   Add health property to Containers model by [@​TurnrDev](https://redirect.github.com/TurnrDev) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3147](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3147)
-   build(deps): Bump urllib3 from 1.26.11 to 1.26.18 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3183](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3183)
-   breaking: Python 3.12 compatibility & remove custom SSL adapter by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3185](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3185)
-   chore: add changelog for 7.0.0 by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3186](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3186)
-   chore: remove support for Python 3.7 by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3187](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3187)
-   chore: update MAINTAINERS and remove CODEOWNERS by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3188](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3188)
-   chore: fix missing setuptools in CI by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3189](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3189)
-   Fix [#​3153](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3153) - Validate tag before build using OCI regex by [@​LombardiDaniel](https://redirect.github.com/LombardiDaniel) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3191](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3191)
-   feat: accept filters and keep_storage in prune_builds by [@​emranbm](https://redirect.github.com/emranbm) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3192](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3192)
-   chore: update changelog and maintainer by [@​milas](https://redirect.github.com/milas) in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3193](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3193)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​Longin-Yu](https://redirect.github.com/Longin-Yu) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3130](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3130)
-   [@​mndeveci](https://redirect.github.com/mndeveci) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3156](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3156)
-   [@​VincentLeeMax](https://redirect.github.com/VincentLeeMax) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3159](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3159)
-   [@​akerouanton](https://redirect.github.com/akerouanton) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3169](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3169)
-   [@​TurnrDev](https://redirect.github.com/TurnrDev) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3147](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3147)
-   [@​LombardiDaniel](https://redirect.github.com/LombardiDaniel) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3191](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3191)
-   [@​emranbm](https://redirect.github.com/emranbm) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3192](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3192)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/docker/docker-py/compare/6.1.3...7.0.0

</details>
